creator: enrico.m.crisostomo@gmail.com
text:
This update:

  * Ships logstash 1.5.1.  This release uses the latest version of JRuby that resolves a long-standing jnr-ffi bug that prevented logstash to work on FreeBSD.   previous versions of this port patched JRuby).

SVN changes:

M       Makefile
M       distinfo
M       files/logstash.in
M       pkg-descr
A       pkg-message
M       pkg-plist

Attachments:

  * logstash-1.5.1.diff
  * poudriere-logstash-1.5.1.txt
